tool_args.label: May Timetable Change & Track Work Programs

payload.title: MAY TIMETABLE CHANGE & TRACKWORK PROGRAMS
payload.description: Staff summary informing the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to adjust schedules beginning May 22, 2023, through September 5, 2023, including construction activities and track work programs.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA Long Island Rail Road
Long Island Committee
MTA Capital Program
Third Rail State of Good Repair - Montauk Branch

payload.project_name: Third Rail State of Good Repair work on the Montauk Branch between Amityville and Babylon
payload.description: One of two main tracks will be out of service on midday/weekdays between Amityville and Babylon as third rail state of good repair work and maintenance is performed.
payload.location: Montauk Branch between Amityville and Babylon

location_normalized.raw_text: Montauk Branch between Amityville and Babylon

tool_args.label: Signal Hut Installation - Montauk Branch

payload.project_name: Signal Hut Installation on Montauk Branch between Babylon and Sayville
payload.description: One of two main tracks will be out of service during the overnight period between Babylon and Sayville to support the delivery and installation of signal huts on the Montauk Branch.
payload.location: Montauk Branch between Babylon and Sayville

location_normalized.raw_text: Montauk Branch between Babylon and Sayville

tool_args.label: Rail Replacement - Atlantic Branch

payload.project_name: Rail Replacement and Maintenance on the Atlantic Branch between Atlantic Terminal and East New York
payload.description: One of two main tracks will be out of service on midday/weekdays between Atlantic Terminal and East New York to support the replacement of rail and maintenance.
payload.location: Atlantic Branch between Atlantic Terminal and East New York

location_normalized.raw_text: Atlantic Branch between Atlantic Terminal and East New York

tool_args.label: East Side Access

payload.description: Continuing project supported during the May 2023 timetable change.

tool_args.label: Main Line Expansion

payload.description: Continuing project supported during the May 2023 timetable change.

tool_args.label: West Side Yard Overbuild

payload.description: Continuing project supported during the May 2023 timetable change.

tool_args.label: Mid-Suffolk Yard Construction

payload.description: Continuing project supported during the May 2023 timetable change.

tool_args.label: Rail Replacement - Long Beach and Far Rockaway Branches

payload.project_name: Rail Replacement and Maintenance on the Long Beach and Far Rockaway Branches
payload.description: On weekends April 29-30, May 6-7, and May 20-21, one of two main tracks on the Long Beach Branch and both main tracks on the Far Rockaway Branch will be out of service for 48 hours while rail is replaced and signal maintenance performed.

tool_args.label: Cherry Valley Bridge Waterproofing

payload.project_name: Cherry Valley Bridge Waterproofing on the Hempstead Branch
payload.description: On Saturday, May 13 both main tracks on the Hempstead Branch between Floral Park and Hempstead will be taken out of service for approximately 24 hours while the Cherry Valley Bridge in Garden City is waterproofed.
payload.location: Cherry Valley Bridge, Garden City, Hempstead Branch between Floral Park and Hempstead

location_normalized.raw_text: Cherry Valley Bridge, Garden City, Hempstead Branch between Floral Park and Hempstead

tool_args.label: May 22 Timetable Change

payload.description: LIRR schedule adjustments beginning May 22, 2023 through September 5, 2023 to support construction activities.

tool_args.label: Long Beach and Far Rockaway Rail Replacement Weekends

payload.description: Weekend rail replacement and signal maintenance on Long Beach and Far Rockaway Branches; bus service replaces train service between Valley Stream and Far Rockaway for 48-hour periods each weekend.

tool_args.label: Cherry Valley Bridge Waterproofing

payload.description: Hempstead Branch between Floral Park and Hempstead taken out of service for approximately 24 hours while Cherry Valley Bridge in Garden City is waterproofed; bus service replaces train service in both directions.

tool_args.label: Long Island Committee Meeting

payload.description: Long Island Committee meeting to consider the May timetable change and track work programs. Board Action: LI COMM 4/24/23.
